title: Evolve Loop Phase Descriptor
description: The unified, declarative definition of a pipeline phase (a registry entry in docs/architecture/phase-registry.json:phases[], or an operator overlay at .evolve/phases/<name>/phase.json). Mirrors go/internal/phasespec.PhaseSpec. This schema is a LINT AID consumed by `evolve phase lint`; it is NOT a load-time gate (the runtime parser is tolerant + fail-open, ADR-0035). The deliverable contract (artifact path, kind, required sections, verdict vocab) is DERIVED from these fields by phasecontract.FromSpec — there is no separate contract file.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier. Safe as a filename, agent suffix, and routing token.

kind.description: Runner kind. Only 'llm' is executable today; 'native'/'command' are reserved. Orthogonal to the deliverable's markdown/json shape (that is derived from outputs.files[0]'s extension).

archetype.description: Composition archetype for advisor selection and the integrity floor. Inferred from name when omitted. Note: distinct from the registry 'role' key (the agent/profile name).

optional.description: User (overlay) phases MUST be optional:true — a user phase can never displace or satisfy the build->audit->ship floor.

agent.description: Persona basename under agents/ (without .md). Defaults to evolve-<name>.

model.description: Model tier or sentinel. Defaults to 'auto'.

writes_source.description: Whether the phase writes production code (runs in the worktree under the role-gate).

description.description: One line: what the phase produces. Rendered into the phase inventory and the advisor's SELECT catalog (ADR-0038).

when_to_use.description: The signal/goal that should trigger SELECTing this phase — the advisor's primary routing hint. Keep it under ~140 characters; the catalog renderer truncates beyond that.

categories.description: Goal types this phase serves; drives the inventory's category_index and the advisor's goal-type relevance filter. Unknown values are a lint warning, never a load failure.

enable_var.description: Env var that toggles the phase.

classify.description: Declarative verdict rules. require_sections drives the DERIVED contract's required markdown headings; verdict_on_pass opts an evaluate phase into the PASS/FAIL/WARN/SKIPPED verdict vocabulary.

routing.description: Conditional/dynamic-edge triggers evaluated against the digested signal plane. insert_when adds the phase; skip_when removes it.

after.description: Slot this phase right after the named phase in the routing order. Empty defaults to the pre-audit slot.
